workshopUsers.//: One entry per workshop participant or per Entra group of participants. Replace objectId with a real Entra user/group object id. principalType is 'User', 'Group', or 'ServicePrincipal'. Find a user id with: az ad user show --id alias@contoso.com --query id -o tsv. Find a group id with: az ad group show --group 'workshop-participants' --query id -o tsv

userAccess.//: Part D — the exact level of access participants receive. Change a roleDefinitionId to raise/lower a level, or edit the Cosmos dataActions list.

value.//foundry: Foundry project access. Default: Foundry User (formerly Azure AI User) = run + create agents, but NOT create/delete model deployments.
value.//search: AI Search access. Default: Search Index Data Reader = read (query) only.
value.//cosmos: Cosmos DB access. Default dataActions = read/write ITEMS only (no container create/delete/scale).
